ComparisonSection.header: How does FotoLabs.ai compare to other AI photo generators?
ComparisonSection.subheader: FotoLabs.ai is the best choice for creating high-quality AI images, easy to use from the comfort of WhatsApp.

UsesSection.content_1: Use AI to generate better dating photos for Tinder, Bumble and Hinge. Get more matches and make your dating profile stand out on dating apps with personalized, high-quality images. Experiment with different poses, outfits, and settings
UsesSection.content_2: Get a professional look with professional headshots you can use on your LinkedIn. Stand out from the competition, increase your visibility, attract more job offers by making a strong first impression
UsesSection.content_3: Capture different outfits and styles to see what fits you best. Use AI to visualize how various clothes look on you before making a choice. Ideas: trendy, casual, beach, provocative, retro, traditional, cyberpunk, biker, etc.
UsesSection.content_4: Travel the world and capture stunning photos from Paris to Tokyo. Showcase your global adventures with vibrant images from iconic cities and diverse cultures
UsesSection.content_5: Take engaging and visually stunning photos that showcase your personality as an Instagram influencer. Boost your confidence, likes and followers with captivating images that reflect your unique style and charisma
UsesSection.content_6: Experiment with a variety of hairstyles that express your individuality. Whether it’s chic curls, sleek braids, or bold fades, show off your look with striking images

PriceSection.subheader: Get started with our straightforward pricing plan. No hidden fees, just great value.
PriceSection.for_individuals_and_small_teams: Perfect for individuals and small teams

FAQSection.subheader: Here are some of the most frequently asked questions about FotoLabs.ai

faqs.question: How does FotoLabs.ai work?
faqs.answer: FotoLabs.ai allows you to generate AI photos through WhatsApp. Simply send a message to our WhatsApp number, make a payment, upload 5-15 good quality photos of yourself, and start creating unlimited AI-generated images for 30 days!

faqs.question: What can I use FotoLabs.ai for?
faqs.answer: FotoLabs.ai can be used for various purposes, including creating better dating profile photos, professional headshots for LinkedIn, trying on different outfits, generating travel photos, creating engaging Instagram content, and experimenting with different hairstyles.

faqs.question: How much does FotoLabs.ai cost?
faqs.answer: Currently we have a special offer of $19.99 for 30 days unlimited AI photos, which is discounted from our regular price of $29.99.

faqs.question: Is my data secure with FotoLabs.ai?
faqs.answer: Yes, we take data privacy and security seriously. All conversations are encrypted, and we do not store personal information without explicit consent.

faqs.question: How long does it take to generate AI photos?
faqs.answer: After uploading your photos, it typically takes about 3 minutes to process. Then, you can start generating AI photos instantly.

faqs.question: Can I use FotoLabs.ai to try on clothes?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can use FotoLabs.ai to visualize how various clothes look on you before making a choice. It's great for exploring different styles and outfits.

faqs.question: Is FotoLabs.ai available 24/7?
faqs.answer: Yes, FotoLabs.ai is available round the clock through WhatsApp, providing assistance whenever you need it.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You can initiate your cancellation request by visiting the link in the footer of our website (https://fotolabs.ai/cancel-subscription).

faqs.question: What type of photos should I upload?
faqs.answer: We recommend uploading 5-15 high-quality photos with good variety. Include a mix of close-up selfies and full-body shots in different settings, angles, and expressions.

faqs.question: Can I generate photos of minors or children?
faqs.answer: No, it is strictly prohibited to generate photos of minors or children. Our service is designed for adults (18+) only.

faqs.question: Do you have a referral program?
faqs.answer: Yes! Any customers who pay for FotoLabs.ai will receive a unique promo code in WhatsApp, which they can share with friends or family. When using this promo code during Stripe checkout, the referred user gets their first month completely free. Each code can only be used once.

faqs.question: What AI model does FotoLabs.ai use?
faqs.answer: FotoLabs.ai uses our own AI generation pipeline, which is trained for high photorealism. We continuously work on improving it to provide the best possible results.

faqs.question: What will you do with my AI character photos?
faqs.answer: We only use your photos to create an AI character. Your data privacy and security are our top priorities.

faqs.question: Can I use FotoLabs.ai to try on clothes?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can upload any clothes, and the character will wear them for you. While the character isn't perfect with prints yet, we're working on improving this feature very soon.

faqs.question: How much will the photos look like me?
faqs.answer: The resemblance of the photos to you depends on the quality and variety of the photos you upload. The better and more varied your photos, the more accurately the AI can understand and represent your unique characteristics. We keep improving our models every day.

faqs.question: Is the payment service secure?
faqs.answer: Yes, our payment service is secure. We use Stripe for financial processing, and we do not store any information about your card. Stripe ensures bank-level security standards.

faqs.question: Do my photos and models remain private?
faqs.answer: Yes! The models you create and photos you upload and take stay private. Your personal data, images, and AI models are stored securely, and our system is designed to protect your information from unauthorized access.

faqs.question: Can I get a refund?
faqs.answer: Unfortunately, we cannot offer refunds as costs incurred for creating AI models and generating AI photos are extremely high. Our upstream providers do not allow us to request refunds for the GPU processing time used to create your AI models and generate your AI photos. This would make it a loss-making endeavor for us. During sign-up, you agree to withhold your right to a refund for this reason. However, you can cancel anytime, and your subscription will end at the end of the current billing period.
